headline: Efficiency techniques led the week as prompt caching and quantization broke out alongside a cluster of model-compression and agent methods.
body: Prompt caching and quantization topped the movers and both registered as breakouts, joined by transformer pruning, parameter sharing, scheduling, advantage weighting, agent skills, and prompt-injection defense, signaling a rotation toward inference efficiency and agent reliability. Enterprise deployment supplied the demand context: large banks are rolling out Claude across their organizations, and NVIDIA shipped frameworks for XR agents and for transaction foundation models [9][6][11]. Infrastructure shifted on both ends, with GitHub Models closing to new customers and France moving off Palantir toward a domestic provider [8][4]. Reliability, content moderation, Claude, and testing held the leading tier among tools.

cited_items.title: Building AI Agents for AR Glasses and XR Devices with NVIDIA XR AI
Build Your Own Transaction Foundation Model for Financial Intelligence
GitHub Models is no longer available to new customers
France to ditch Palantir's AI data tools in favour of domestic provider
